name: Classic Penny Loafer
summary: Timeless leather penny loafer with premium craftsmanship

reviews: [{"rating":5,"comment":"Most comfortable dress shoes I've owned. True to size."},{"rating":4,"comment":"Great quality, but needed a few days to break in."}]
